Outcomes Improved internal communication. More effective sales presentations. Increased team confidence and productivity. “The feedback has been phenomenal.

I offer professional development training, for the subject matter experts who can’t quite get their point across. My corporate training offers the tools your team needs to speak up and communicate their message clearly and effectively. In-person and online training available. Schedule a call Key Benefits Enhanced Communication : Improve clarity and impact. Confidence Building : Empower your team to present with poise. Customizable Content : Tailored to your specific industry and needs.

Do you feel like your team struggles to get their point across and properly showcase their expertise. How effective are your people in getting their point across. Do they keep to the point, or do they waffle and ramble. Do they communicate with clarity and conviction. Whether they’re pitching a business idea, speaking at a trade show or making their point in the boardroom your team needs to be ‘on it’; they must ‘own the moment’. And that’s where I can help.

Working with me, you will follow a st

## For Your Team |
0 Skip to Content For You | Master your Pitch Own the Room Engage on Stage Power Session For Your Team | About | Courses | Master Your Pitch Communicate with Confidence Blog | Get in Touch Open Menu Close Menu Get in Touch For You | Master your Pitch Own the Room Engage on Stage Power Session For Your Team | About | Courses | Master Your Pitch Communicate with Confidence Blog | Open Menu Close Menu Folder: For You | Back Master your Pitch Own the Room Engage on Stage Power Session For Your Team | About | Folder: Courses | Back Master Your Pitch Communicate with Confidence Blog | Get in Touch Increase Your Influence  Tailored team training for confident presentations and clear communication Download Brochure Do you have employees who never speak up in meetings.

I know that the fear of public speaking can be paralysing – that the mere thought of speaking out, can make you crumble. My focus is to take that paralysing fear out of communication and give you the tools to flourish as a public speaker. Whether it is a sixty-second pitch or a sixty-minute talk, your presentation is your opportunity to connect with the audience and make an impact with your message.

With my personalised one-to-one workshops, team training and masterclasses, public speaking moves from a common fear to a core asset. Schedule an Intro Call   Public speaking anxiety is common. But the art of public speaking can be mastered with some personalised and efficient training sessions. Confident communication is a skill that you or your team can enjoy acquiring and then applying My range of communication training services may be broad – but the focus is sharp.

I have seen how the fear of speaking in public has held people back in their business and in their careers. I am here to offer you the tools to Unlock Speaking Confidence.   I believe that confidence can be tapped into, and can be unlocked by surrounding ourselves with the right people. People who support, encourage and recognise our achievements. That is what I offer to my clients.

Empower Your Team to Speak Confidently Masterclasses Develop your pitching and presentation skills in a small, supportive group environment. Learn and apply proven techniques, and get helpful feedback to refine your skills. Nail Your Public Speaking Skills.

My one-to-one, personalised workshops will give you the tools to engage your audience, develop a convincing presence in front of colleagues, clients and senior management and speak with confidence in any situation. Confident Speaking Starts Here In-Company Unleash your team’s potential with my In-house Communication & Presentation Team Training. Upskill your staff for a strong team that can communicate efficiently and with confidence, both internally and to clients.

Straight-forward, professional and friendly training for confident communication. My training can help you overcome your public speaking anxiety, create your own confidence, gain personal gravitas and articulate, communicate and present like never before. After working with me, you’ll be able to articulate, communicate and present with confidence. Some of My Clients Work With Me One-to-One Communicate with confidence in the workplace.

You’re about to deliver a speech at a conference, you’re presenting to the board or pitching your business at a networking meeting… you’re terrified, your throat dries up, you feel you are about to be judged.   This moment could be career-defining and you have no choice, you have to step up and speak. I have two pieces of good news for you: You are not alone, almost everyone has known your fear - the fear of speaking in public. There is a solution.

I have over 30 years of experience teaching, presenting and connecting. My mission is to take the fear out of speaking in public. There’s no reason why networking, pitching, reporting and presenting can’t be productive, successful and enjoyable for everyone. I look forward to unlocking your speaking confidence. Not Sure Where to Start. Let’s Talk. I know how it feels.

Led by expert coach Maureen McCowen, we specialize in 
corporate training, professional development, and team communication skills 
in Ireland
